clues.clue: White Castle, opened in 1921, is often credited as the first chain selling these small square patties.
The McDonald brothers launched their original stand in San Bernardino, in this U.S. state.
Colonel Sanders first cooked his secret-recipe chicken at a roadside spot in this Bluegrass State.
A standard Subway 'footlong' sandwich measures this many inches.
Before franchising burgers, Ray Kroc sold these five-spindled milkshake machines.
These translucent, chewy bear-shaped candies come in fruit flavors.
These long, twisted red licorice-style ropes are a Hershey's chewy treat.
These individually wrapped, chewy fruit squares are sold in a pink-heavy pack.
This pulled, pastel boardwalk treat is named for the sea despite containing little of it.
Sour gummy worms get their pucker from a coating of this tangy crystalline acid.
'I'm Lovin' It,' set to a famous five-note jingle, belongs to this arches chain.
'Eat Fresh' was long the tagline of this footlong-sandwich chain.
'Think Outside the Bun' urged customers toward this taco-and-burrito chain.
'Finger Lickin' Good' is the classic line of this Colonel's chicken chain.
'Have It Your Way' was for decades the motto of this Whopper-selling chain.
Alexander Fleming discovered this mold-derived antibiotic in 1928.
Jonas Salk developed the first effective vaccine against this paralyzing disease.
This English doctor pioneered smallpox vaccination using cowpox.
Marie Curie won Nobel Prizes for her work on this phenomenon, a term she coined.
Wilhelm Roentgen discovered these penetrating imaging rays in 1895.
This aged Jedi lets Vader strike him down, then vanishes leaving empty robes.
Hitchcock shocked audiences by killing this lead character in an early shower stabbing.
In 'Titanic,' this poor artist freezes in the Atlantic so Rose can survive on a door.
Mufasa is trampled to death in a stampede of these horned plains animals.
In 'Old Yeller,' the boy must tearfully shoot his loyal pet after it contracts this disease.

final.clue: Voiced by Ellen DeGeneres, this forgetful blue tang debuted in a 2003 Pixar film and headlined a 2016 sequel of her own.
